title: ranunculus minutiflorus var. miser
intro: Ranunculus minutiflorus var. miser is a lesser-known variety of the ranunculus plant, a flowering plant in the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). The plant is also known as a small-flowered buttercup, and its medicinal properties have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and support immune function.
